arts.ttl: Brighton v Liverpool: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Live updates from the 8pm kick-off at the Amex Ten talking points from the weekend’s action Get in touch! Email Michael with your thoughts Liverpool may have taken the phrase ‘on the beach’ a little too literally in the last week – with manager Arne Slot pictured at Wayne Lineker’s beach club in Ibiza alongside former EastEnders actor Dean Gaffney Dean Gaffney (no, really) and the rest of the squad in other cultural destinations like Dubai for Trent Alexander-Arnold’s leaving do – but let’s see what sort of shape they are in tonight. Brighton (a) is a tough gig, even when the champions are firing on all cylinders and actually have something to play for, so this will likely be a tough test for Slot’s brave boys. The Seagulls are still in with a shot of Europe: finishing eighth is still a viable (although not certain) route to the Conference League. There are two ways that the eighth-placed team can get a place in the Conference League: Continue reading...

arts.sum: Liverpool continue their run-in with a trip to the south coast — with a decision to be made over their departing right-back

arts.ttl: Brighton vs. Liverpool: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: Champions Liverpool visit Brighton in the Premier League on Monday night. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, score prediction and more.

Brighton have now won two of their last three following their 2-0 win at Wolves last weekend. The Seagulls have lost only one of their last seven at the AMEX, though in turn they have won only one of ...
